zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Sackville於大約1046年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利索可維爾時，他的父親Herbrand de Sackville27歲，母親Godchilde de Ponthieu28歲。他和Lettice Woodville de Wydeville至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1113年在英國威爾斯布洛可爾內藍德享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Sackville was born about 1046, in Sauqueville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Herbrand de Sackville, was 27 and his mother, Godchilde de Ponthieu, was 28. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Lettice Woodville de Wydeville. He died in 1113, in Neyland, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Sackville est né environ 1046, à Sauqueville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Herbrand de Sackville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Godchilde de Ponthieu, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Lettice Woodville de Wydeville. Il est décédé en 1113, à Neyland, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Sackville um 1046 in Sauqueville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbrand de Sackville 27 und seine Mutter Godchilde de Ponthieu 28. Er hatte mit Lettice Woodville de Wydeville mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1113 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Neyland, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Sackville è nato il circa 1046 nel Sauqueville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Herbrand de Sackville, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Godchilde de Ponthieu, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Lettice Woodville de Wydeville. Morì nel 1113, nel Neyland, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Sackvilleが約1046年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサウクエヴィルで生まれた時，父Herbrand de Sackvilleは27歳，母Godchilde de Ponthieuは28歳であった。彼はLettice Woodville de Wydevilleとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1113年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアニーランドで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Sackville(이)가 대략 1046년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 소크에빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbrand de Sackville(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Godchilde de Ponthieu(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Lettice Woodville de Wydeville(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1113년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 니랜드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Sackville nasceu aproximadamente 1046, em Sauqueville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Herbrand de Sackville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Godchilde de Ponthieu, tinha 28 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Sackville родился около 1046 г. в местности саукуевилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Herbrand de Sackville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Godchilde de Ponthieu, 28. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Lettice Woodville de Wydeville. Он умер в 1113 г. в местности ниланд, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
